name: Food Safety Intake
description: Agricultural food safety compliance intake. Evaluates a farm or food operation's compliance posture under FSMA, GAP, HACCP, and related frameworks — assessing produce handling, water testing, worker hygiene, traceability, and recordkeeping practices. Produces a food safety compliance profile with gap analysis and corrective action priorities.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.

types.name: Food Safety Compliance Report
types.description: Generated food safety compliance report from intake session data.
